rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 27, 2014, Line 1: Claimants Bank Of America's Motion for Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds: continued to November 7, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501. rulings.Case Title: BRENDAN QUINLAN VS. JOHN PAXTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 27, 2014, Line 8: Plaintiff'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees: DENIED. rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 27, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT 39-41 LAKE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: continued to November 14, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 501. rulings.Case Title: MTC FINANCIAL INC DBA TRUSTEE CORPS VS. IN RE: 794 RHODE ISLAND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO

rulings.Case Title: BRIDGEWAY VISTA II L.P. VS. WILLIE L. BURCH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 27, 2014, Line : DEFENDANT ROBERT MACSHATE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer per CCP 1161a. Moving defendant's tenancy and applicability of SRO are issues of fact not properly addressed on a demurrer. (501/GLW)
